data.title: As a practitioner, I can see which planning mechanisms engaged via the planning-intelligence log
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Extend the brainstorm planning-intelligence log with three new fields that record when each new mechanism engages.
**Why**: Without traceable artifacts, practitioners cannot verify whether the new gates are functioning or retrospectively analyze mechanism effectiveness.
**Scope**:
- IN: Add log fields for follow-on scrutiny (ran + depth), feasibility-resolution loop (cycle count + triggering gap), LLM-instruction signal (fired + matched keyword). Consume named state variables exposed by Stories 1, 2, 3.
- OUT: Implementation of the mechanisms themselves (Stories 1, 2, 3). Documentation (Story 5).

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, the planning-intelligence log records whether follow-on scrutiny ran and the depth reached, whether the feasibility-resolution loop cycled (with count and triggering gap), and whether the LLM-instruction signal fired (with matched keyword)
  ← Satisfies: "planning-intelligence log records when each new mechanism engages"
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Integration] Stories 1, 2, and 3 must each propagate their state (cycle count, depth, matched keyword) to the planning-intelligence log site in brainstorm Phase 2 Step 4. This story consumes those values — if they are not exposed, this story must retroactively instrument them.

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
